error TS-1: Pre-emit (3) and post-emit (5) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
superCallsInConstructor.ts(7,5): error TS2564: Property 'x' has no initializer and is not definitely assigned in the constructor.
superCallsInConstructor.ts(12,9): error TS1101: 'with' statements are not allowed in strict mode.
superCallsInConstructor.ts(12,9): error TS2410: The 'with' statement is not supported. All symbols in a 'with' block will have type 'any'.


!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (3) and post-emit (5) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2304 superCallsInConstructor.ts:13:13: Cannot find name 'foo'.
!!! related TS2304 superCallsInConstructor.ts:15:13: Cannot find name 'bar'.
==== superCallsInConstructor.ts (3 errors) ====
    class C {
        foo() {}
        bar() {}
    }
    
    class Base {
        x: string;
        ~
!!! error TS2564: Property 'x' has no initializer and is not definitely assigned in the constructor.
    }
     
    class Derived extends Base {
        constructor() {
            with(new C()) {
            ~~~~
!!! error TS1101: 'with' statements are not allowed in strict mode.
            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2410: The 'with' statement is not supported. All symbols in a 'with' block will have type 'any'.
                foo();
                super();
                bar();
            }
    
            try {} catch(e) { super(); }
        }
    }
